SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN total_2012 IS NULL OR total_2012 = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE (total_2012 - total_2013) / total_2012 * 100.0
    END AS reduction_rate_percent
FROM (
    SELECT 
        (SELECT SUM(t2.Amount * t2.Price)
         FROM transactions_1k t2
         WHERE t2.CustomerID = (
               SELECT t1.CustomerID
               FROM transactions_1k t1
               WHERE t1.Date = '2012/8/25' AND t1.Amount * t1.Price = 634.8
               LIMIT 1
           )
           AND strftime('%Y', t2.Date) = '2012'
        ) AS total_2012,
        (SELECT SUM(t3.Amount * t3.Price)
         FROM transactions_1k t3
         WHERE t3.CustomerID = (
               SELECT t1.CustomerID
               FROM transactions_1k t1
               WHERE t1.Date = '2012/8/25' AND t1.Amount * t1.Price = 634.8
               LIMIT 1
           )
           AND strftime('%Y', t3.Date) = '2013'
        ) AS total_2013
);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
